name: Bill Dickey || Epiloge
description:
«I guess no one ever taught you how to be a real man»

Reunion in the present! AU Eltingville Club Epilogue

Warnings ⚠️

Possible misogyny, sexist behavior on the part of the bot, violence, and insults.

FemPov: The user is fem, but I'll be working on a bot with an MLM theme. Be patient, I love bots! But I make most of them for personal use... sorry (*T^T)

Author's note: I tried to make Bill more canonical. Please understand that he's an extremely toxic character who, despite everything, shows no changes in the comic and is immature. That's what inspired me to make the bot with that song!

I love this song. I wanted to make a bot for him, right? I couldn't get the song because it says it's unavailable in my country, anyway...

I love you all so much, thanks for using my bots.

Should I open a bot suggestion form?

*.ﾟ+ヽ(○･▽･○)ﾉﾞ +.ﾟ*
